# Job-Lens AI

> AI-powered career platform for job seekers in Germany, Austria, Switzerland (DACH) and India.

Job-Lens AI helps professionals find jobs, tailor their CV, write cover letters, auto-apply, and prepare for interviews — all with AI assistance. Free to start with 5 credits on signup.

## What Job-Lens AI does

- **AI Job Search** — searches thousands of jobs in Germany, Austria, Switzerland and India, scored and ranked by CV match
- **CV Tailoring** — rewrites your CV for a specific job description using Claude AI, section by section
- **Cover Letter Generation** — writes a personalised cover letter matched to the job and your CV in seconds
- **ATS Score / Career Scan** — scores your CV against a job description, identifies gaps, and suggests improvements
- **Auto-Apply** — fills and submits job application forms automatically using browser automation
- **Job Case** — saves your job applications as structured cases: CV, cover letter, contacts, notes and status tracking
- **Interview Prep** — AI-generated interview questions and answers based on your CV and target role
- **Salary Simulator** — estimates salary range for a role in Germany, Austria, Switzerland or India
- **Work Visa Guidance** — AI guidance on work visa requirements for DACH countries
- **Zeugnis Analyser** (DACH) — analyses German work references (Arbeitszeugnisse) and decodes hidden meanings
- **Profile Analysis** (India) — deep career analysis for the Indian job market, sector trends and upskilling advice
- **AI Assistant** — conversational AI assistant that can search jobs and score them in real time

## Who it is for

- Job seekers in Germany, Austria, Switzerland looking for work in any sector
- Indian professionals applying to jobs in India or looking to migrate to DACH countries
- Career changers who need to reposition their CV quickly
- Developers, engineers, finance professionals, healthcare workers, and anyone who applies to multiple jobs

## Markets

| Market | URL | Language | Currency |
|--------|-----|----------|----------|
| DACH (Germany, Austria, Switzerland) | https://job-lens.de/ | German / English | EUR |
| India | https://job-lens.de/in | English | INR |

## Pricing

- Free plan: 5 credits on signup, no credit card required
- DACH paid credits: available via PayPal (EUR)
- India paid credits: available via Razorpay (INR) — from ₹149

## Credit costs

- CV tailoring: 1 credit
- Cover letter: 1 credit
- Career scan / ATS score: 2 credits
- Auto-apply: 3 credits
- Job search, AI assistant, profile analysis: free

## Key URLs

- DACH home: https://job-lens.de/
- India home: https://job-lens.de/in
- DACH job search: https://job-lens.de/app/smart-apply
- India job search: https://job-lens.de/in/jobs
- CV builder: https://job-lens.de/app/cv-builder
- ATS career scan: https://job-lens.de/app/career-scan
- Auto-apply: https://job-lens.de/app/auto-apply
- Interview prep: https://job-lens.de/app/interview
- Salary simulator: https://job-lens.de/app/salary-sim
- Job case tracker: https://job-lens.de/app/job-case
- India CV builder: https://job-lens.de/in/cv-builder
- India career scan: https://job-lens.de/in/career-scan
- India profile analysis: https://job-lens.de/in/profile-analysis
- India auto-apply: https://job-lens.de/in/auto-apply
- Login (DACH): https://job-lens.de/login
- Login (India): https://job-lens.de/in/login

## Alternatives Job-Lens AI is compared to

Kickresume, Resume.io, Jobscan, Teal, LinkedIn Easy Apply, Indeed, Naukri, Rezi, EnhanCV

## Contact

Website: https://job-lens.de
Support: via contact form at https://job-lens.de/contact
